metadata.title: China — the party-state deep structure: the CCP/Xi vertical, SASAC central SOEs, military-civil fusion, the LGFV debt mountain, the PBoC/CIPS yuan rail, and the big-tech crackdown cycle
metadata.status: the party/state organs, SOE/SASAC role, MCF policy, LGFV/deficit figures, and the 15th FYP are FACT (CRS/USCC/Brookings/PRC docs); the 'party-IS-the-state / weaponized economy' reading is graded; composition guard applied (the party is factionalized — the Fourth Plenum purges)
metadata.frame: The capstone that ties together the China threads already in the map (China-AI, quantum/USTC, standards/SC42, MSS/cyber, the yuan/CIPS rail, the shadow fleet, Iran oil, the chaebol-adjacent SOEs). Six layers: (1) the PARTY VERTICAL (CCP/Xi/Politburo Standing Committee/CMC) where the Party — not the government — holds ultimate authority; (2) the STATE-OWNED economy (SASAC + central SOEs at the commanding heights; SOE transfers +55% in 2025); (3) MILITARY-CIVIL FUSION channeling civilian S&T (AI, chips) into the PLA; (4) the LGFV DEBT mountain + record ~9%-of-GDP deficit as the fiscal counterweight; (5) the PBoC/CIPS YUAN rail that the sanctioned states (Russia/Iran) settle through; (6) the BIG-TECH crackdown-then-leash cycle (Ant/DiDi/Alibaba). The 15th Five-Year Plan (NPC, Mar 2026) is the integrating document — AI mentioned 50+ times, MCF re-emphasized, the center reasserting over provinces.

the_party_vertical: In China the PARTY is the state: the CCP, not the government, holds ultimate authority. Xi Jinping concentrates power as General Secretary (party), President (state), and Chairman of the Central Military Commission (army) — the 'three crowns.' The Politburo Standing Committee is the apex decision body; the State Council (government/cabinet) executes party direction. NOT a monolith, though: the Fourth Plenum (2025) purged ~10 Central Committee members — 'policy continuity, personnel turmoil' — so the composition guard holds (factional churn under a centralizing leader). grade: fact.
the_state_economy: SASAC (State-owned Assets Supervision and Administration Commission) oversees the central SOEs that occupy the 'commanding heights' (energy, telecom, banks, rail, defense). The state is reasserting economic primacy: SOE transfers to the budget rose +55% in 2025 (2.7% of public revenue, a post-2010 high) even as the private 'animal spirits' were dampened by the tech crackdown. The chaebol/keiretsu comparison (spec-east-asia) inverts: here the state owns the champions outright. grade: fact.
the_military_civil_fusion: Military-Civil Fusion (MCF) — quietly re-emphasized in the 2025 plan after Western pushback — creates interoperable civilian-defense standards and a 'green channel' to route civilian S&T (AI, chips, quantum, space) into PLA applications. This is the mechanism that makes the corpus's China-AI, China-AI-hardware, USTC-quantum, and SC42-standards nodes dual-use: civilian capability is, by policy, military capability. The PLA reports to the CMC (Xi), not the state. grade: fact (the policy); specific firm-by-firm transfer is case-dependent (composition guard — don't impute MCF intent to every Chinese firm).
the_debt_counterweight: The fiscal strain the growth story hides: China's general public-budget revenue fell for the first time in 30+ years (2025) and the aggregate deficit hit a record ~9% of GDP. The LGFV (local-government financing vehicle) debt mountain — off-balance-sheet borrowing by provinces for infrastructure — is the systemic risk; the 15th FYP calls for tighter provincial control and a crackdown on 'involution' (ruinous overcapacity competition), with the CENTER reasserting authority over the provinces. grade: fact.
the_yuan_rail: The People's Bank of China (PBoC) operates CIPS — the cross-border yuan settlement system that Russia and Iran route oil-for-RMB through to bypass USD/SWIFT (spec-russia-state-network, spec-iran-state-network). RMB-internationalization is a strategic project: every sanctioned state pushed onto CIPS deepens the yuan bloc — though the yuan's non-convertibility (capital controls) is the ceiling on that ambition AND the leverage over the captive users. grade: fact (PBoC/CIPS); the 'yuan bloc' framing is interpretation.
the_tech_crackdown_cycle: The 2020-22 crackdown disciplined the private tech champions: Ant Group's record IPO was pulled (Nov 2020) and the firm forcibly restructured; DiDi was forced to delist after its defiant US IPO; Alibaba took a record antitrust fine; the CAC/regulators asserted control (and now run the AI-censorship layer). The cycle is crackdown -> leash -> selective rehabilitation (the champions survive but serve the party's priorities). It is the inverse of the US 'operator-network writes the rules' dynamic — here the PARTY writes the rules and the champions comply. grade: fact.
the_honest_reading: China is a party-state where the CCP (via Xi's three crowns) holds ultimate authority over a state-owned commanding-heights economy, channels civilian S&T into the military by policy (MCF), runs the yuan rail the sanctioned states settle through, and disciplines its private champions into compliance — all integrated by the Five-Year-Plan apparatus. The countervailing facts: a record deficit + LGFV debt, factional purges, and the convertibility ceiling on the yuan. The structural finding is CONCENTRATION-BY-DESIGN (the mirror of the West's emergent concentration) — but with real fragilities, and with the composition guard intact (factional, not monolithic; MCF is policy, not proof of any specific firm's intent). Overlay; excluded from the proofs.
